title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Yes Bank Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Yes Bank Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Yes Bank Global Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Risk Analyst at our Tiruchirappalli location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Yes Bank Global Group:
Yes Bank Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yes Bank Global Group!
